Operation 'listCampaigns' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about pagination support and what fields are returned in the response. Adding these details helps AI agents understand how to handle large result sets and what data to expect.

data.current_description: Fetches all campaigns associated with a specific brand.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all campaigns associated with a specific brand. Supports pagination and filtering parameters. Returns a paginated collection of campaign objects containing campaign details, status, and delivery information.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about pagination support and what fields are returned in the response. Adding these details helps AI agents understand how to handle large result sets and what data to expect.

message: Operation 'createCampaign' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks context about what inputs are required, what is returned, and the side effects of creation. Enhanced version clarifies SMS context, input schema, return value, and that the campaign becomes immediately actionable.

data.current_description: Creates new campaign for immediate, scheduled, or draft delivery.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new SMS campaign for a brand with support for immediate, scheduled, or draft delivery modes. Accepts campaign details via CreateCampaignRequest including message content, recipient list, and delivery timing. Returns the created campaign object with assigned campaign ID and initial status. The campaign is immediately available for sending or scheduling based on the specified delivery mode.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context about what inputs are required, what is returned, and the side effects of creation. Enhanced version clarifies SMS context, input schema, return value, and that the campaign becomes immediately actionable.

message: Operation 'updateCampaign' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions state restrictions but lacks details about what can be modified, what inputs are expected, what is returned, and the implications of state-based restrictions. Enhanced version clarifies these aspects for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Allows editing of existing campaigns in draft or scheduled states only.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing campaign that is in draft or scheduled state. Accepts campaign modifications via UpdateCampaignRequest. Sent or completed campaigns cannot be modified. Returns the updated campaign object reflecting all changes. State restrictions prevent modification of campaigns already in delivery or completed.
data.reasoning: Description mentions state restrictions but lacks details about what can be modified, what inputs are expected, what is returned, and the implications of state-based restrictions. Enhanced version clarifies these aspects for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteCampaign' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about what happens after deletion (permanent removal), what response is returned, and what error conditions exist. Enhanced version clarifies these side effects and outcomes for AI agents.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes an unsent campaign in draft or scheduled state. Campaigns that have been sent or completed cannot be deleted. Deletion is permanent and removes all associated campaign data. Returns a success confirmation. Attempting to delete a sent campaign will result in an error.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what happens after deletion (permanent removal), what response is returned, and what error conditions exist. Enhanced version clarifies these side effects and outcomes for AI agents.

message: Operation 'listLists' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. data.current_description: Retrieves all lists associated with a specific brand.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all contact lists associated with a specific brand. Supports pagination parameters. Returns a paginated collection of ContactList objects containing list metadata, contact counts, and creation timestamps.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and doesn't explain pagination support or what fields are included in the response. Adding these details helps AI agents understand result set handling and available list metadata.

message: Operation 'createList' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that it accepts CreateListRequest, specifies what is returned (ContactList with ID), and indicates the list is immediately usable for contact management and campaign targeting.

data.current_description: Creates an empty list on this brand.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new empty contact list for a brand. Accepts list details via CreateListRequest including the list name. Returns the created ContactList object with assigned list ID and metadata. The list is immediately available for adding contacts and use in campaigns.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that it accepts CreateListRequest, specifies what is returned (ContactList with ID), and indicates the list is immediately usable for contact management and campaign targeting.

message: Operation 'getList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is minimal and lacks context about what data is returned. data.current_description: Retrieves a single list with the given list ID.

data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks context about what data is returned. Enhanced description specifies the return structure, required parameters, and domain context (contact list) to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Allows editing of an existing list.

data.current_description: Remove one or more contacts from one or more lists.

Returns confirmation of the operation with details on successfully removed contacts. Contacts remain in the brand after removal; only list membership is affected.

data.current_description: Creates new contact. Only contacts who have given explicit permission may be subscribed.
